creator: logan@elandsys.com
text:
Hi All,

In this version of m4, reallocarray was imported in m4.
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/usr.bin/m4/misc.c?r1=228063&r2=269162


However, the license for reallocarray() is not present:
http://cvsweb.openbsd.org/cgi-bin/cvsweb/~checkout~/src/lib/libc/stdlib/reallocarray.c
